gitCommit.subject: perf(db): fix WARN-level Supabase advisor findings — auth_rls_initplan, multiple_permissive_policies, unused_index (#1712)
gitCommit.body:
perf(db): fix WARN-level Supabase advisor findings — auth_rls_initplan, multiple_permissive_policies, unused_index (#1712)

* docs(audit): auditoria exaustiva dos 200 commits (GitHub + Supabase + Vercel)

Relatório read-only cruzando code scanning, secret scanning, dependabot e CI
do GitHub; advisors de segurança (2.141, 112 ERROR) e performance (527) do
Supabase com verificação RLS/grants ao vivo; deploys/runtime da Vercel; e
varredura dos 200 commits + invariantes do CLAUDE.md.

Achados principais:
- P0: partições magazine_public_view_events_2026_* com RLS off e anon com
  SELECT/INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE sobre session_id/token_hash (exposição de PII).
- P1: service_role key vazada no histórico (alerta secret-scanning aberto);
  380 funções SECURITY DEFINER executáveis por anon; 104 security_definer_view;
  11/30 gates de CI vermelhos no main sem bloquear deploy; achados CodeQL high
  em runtime; URLs do projeto proibido em SQL de migrations; webhook fail-open.
- P2/perf: exposição GraphQL em massa, RLS USING(true), índices duplicados,
  RLS re-avaliando auth.* por linha, tabelas de backup para DROP.

Nenhuma alteração em banco ou código de produção.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Claude-Session: https://claude.ai/code/session_01CvLXD2vCvvhm7jbBmVN7H3

* security: P0 magazine RLS + P1-5 CodeQL HIGH fixes

P0-1 — magazine_public_view_events partitions (_2026_07–10):
  - ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY em todas as 4 partições
  - REVOKE ALL FROM anon, authenticated (service_role bypassa RLS)
  - Trigger magazine_ensure_view_event_partitions atualizado para
    hardenar automaticamente partições futuras

P1-5 CodeQL HIGH:
  - sanitize.ts: iterative strip + remove residual <> (incomplete-multi-char-sanitization)
  - useMagazineReaderState.ts: Math.random → crypto.randomUUID/getRandomValues (insecure-randomness)
  - logger.ts: Object.create(null) + hasOwnProperty guard (remote-property-injection)
  - imageProxy.ts: URL hostname === check em vez de includes (url-substring-sanitization)
  - OptimizedImage.tsx: URL parsing para imagedelivery.net e unsplash.com (url-substring-sanitization)
  - sw.js: hostname.includes → hostname === / endsWith (missing-regexp-anchor)

https://claude.ai/code/session_01CvLXD2vCvvhm7jbBmVN7H3

* security/quality: P1-7 webhook fail-closed + P2 any-type gate fix

P1-7 webhook-inbound:
  - Remove dead corsHeaders = '*' (nunca usado; shared cors.ts já cobre)
  - HMAC fail-closed: se WEBHOOK_INBOUND_SIGNING_SECRET não estiver setado,
    retorna 503 para chamadas não-service-role (era fail-open)

P2 check-any-type-baseline.mjs:
  - Regex corrigido para :\s*any\b e \bas\s+any\b (evita falso-positivo
    com nomes de variável como anyErr)
  - grep -P para suporte a Perl word-boundary \b

P2 rpc-overrides.ts + rest-client.ts:
  - rpcFn: any → rpcFn: unknown (tipo mais seguro)
  - { queryKey, signal }: any → tipagem explícita
  - error: any → error: { status?: number } | null

https://claude.ai/code/session_01CvLXD2vCvvhm7jbBmVN7H3

* chore: P2 cleanups — remove root junk files + MockupPromptManager typed

Root junk removal (hacks operacionais — expõem IP/infra, não pertencem ao repo):
  - test_hardcoded_key.ts, whitelist_external_ip.ts, clear_external_blocks.ts,
    reset_external_attempts.ts, check_external_*.ts, _check.ps1,
    CHANGES_SUMMARY.md, FINAL_STATUS.md

MockupPromptManager.tsx:
  - Migra untypedFrom<Technique>('personalization_techniques') →
    supabase.from('personalization_techniques') tipado (tabela já está em types.ts:16224)
  - Remove import desnecessário de untypedFrom

https://claude.ai/code/session_01CvLXD2vCvvhm7jbBmVN7H3

* perf(rls): fix auth_rls_initplan — wrap auth.uid() em subquery constante

Substitui bare auth.uid() por (SELECT auth.uid()) em 15 políticas RLS
de 8 tabelas de alto tráfego (content_articles, crm_callback_events,
discount_approval_audit, magazine_public_view_events, magazines,
product_badge_definitions, product_views, quote_history).

Impacto: elimina InitPlan por-linha; planner trata como constante —
melhoria de 10–100× em tabelas com 10k+ linhas.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01CvLXD2vCvvhm7jbBmVN7H3

* perf/sec: dedup indexes, FK indexes, policy consolidation & hardening

(A) Drop 4 exact duplicate indexes on kit_component_enrichment_raw
    and kit_component_padronizacao (long auto-gen names duplicating
    short idx_kcer_*/idx_kcpad_* — same column, no WHERE difference).

(B) Create 2 missing FK indexes: magazine_templates.template_id and
    magazines.template_id — FK joins were doing seq scans.

(C) Drop redundant "Users can view own views" SELECT policy on
    product_views — superseded by two explicit policies (exec-7).
    Reduces per-row evaluation from 3 permissive policies to 2.

(D) Harden 3 USING(true)/WITH CHECK(true) ALL policies for
    authenticated role on color_synonym_map, product_qa_image_alerts,
    qa_image_coverage_log: split into SELECT-for-all + ALL-for-admin,
    preventing non-admin authenticated users from writing reference/QA data.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01CvLXD2vCvvhm7jbBmVN7H3

* sec: revoke anon/authenticated access to archive.* and backup.* schemas

Archive and backup schemas contained historical/deprecated tables
(audit_log, auth_login_attempts, staging data, supplier backups)
inadvertently accessible via the public role USAGE grant.

Revokes USAGE on both schemas + all current table privileges + default
privileges for future tables. Includes DO block that raises EXCEPTION
if any grants remain, making the migration self-validating.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01CvLXD2vCvvhm7jbBmVN7H3

* sec(rls): revoke EXECUTE on secdef functions from anon/authenticated — P1-2

(A) Dynamic loop strips ~200 pipeline/credential SECURITY DEFINER functions
    from anon, preserving whitelist: login flows, public catalog RPCs, and
    RLS helper functions (PG requires EXECUTE for roles used in USING clauses).

(B) Explicit revoke from authenticated for 34 credential-leaking and
    destructive-admin functions: fn_get_asia_api_key, fn_get_cf_api_token,
    get_vault_secret, get_edge_anon_key, fn_cascade_product_deactivation,
    fn_vacuum_high_dead_tuples, fn_pgrst_reload, and 27 others.

Both blocks use BEGIN/EXCEPTION to not abort on individual misses.
Idempotent: has_function_privilege() guard skips functions without the grant.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01CvLXD2vCvvhm7jbBmVN7H3

* sec(views): add security_invoker=on to ~65 internal/admin views — P1-3

All internal monitoring, pipeline, QA, and admin views now execute with
the calling user's privileges instead of the view owner's. This prevents
authenticated users from reading internal tables (kit pipeline, system
health, AI enrichment, stock QA, SPOT health) by going through the view.

Excluded from this migration (preserved as-is):
- Views with explicit security_invoker=false (public catalog flows that
  need the view owner's grants to serve anon users)
- Public product/supplier/image/video catalog views (v_products_public,
  v_suppliers_public, v_product_images_cdn, mv_product_cards, etc.)
- Sitemap views and novelty home views

Already had security_invoker=true: performance dashboard, slow queries,
price history, AI routing, orphan variants, image type dropblockers.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01CvLXD2vCvvhm7jbBmVN7H3

* sec(storage): harden mockup-assets bucket — remove anon enumeration — P2

(A) Drops "Anyone can view mockup assets" (public role SELECT) replacing it
    with authenticated-only SELECT. Public URLs (getPublicUrl) still work
    via CDN since bucket remains public=true; only API-level file listing
    by anon is blocked.

(B/C) Fixes auth.uid() InitPlan bug in UPDATE and DELETE policies —
    replaced with (SELECT auth.uid()) to evaluate once per query.

(D) Adds scoped INSERT policy for authenticated users limited to their
    own folder prefix (auth.uid() as first path segment). Edge functions
    using service_role bypass RLS and are unaffected.

Validation DO block confirms no anon SELECT policy remains.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01CvLXD2vCvvhm7jbBmVN7H3

* ci: fix non-existent action versions across 30 workflow files

Replace actions/checkout@v5, actions/setup-node@v6 and
actions/upload-artifact@v5 — versions that do not exist — with
their current stable counterparts (@v4). Affected workflows span
e2e, visual-tests, ci-freight-quality, ci-quotes-wizard, delivery,
deploy-*, edge-integration-all, contract-tests and others.

Third-party actions (crazy-max/ghaction-github-labeler@v5,
dawidd6/action-download-artifact@v6) are left unchanged as those
version numbers are correct for their respective projects.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01CvLXD2vCvvhm7jbBmVN7H3

* cleanup(db): drop archive and backup schemas — ~5.2 GB freed

Physically removes all 45 archive.* and 42 backup.* tables after
migration 000004 had already revoked anon/authenticated access.

Notable drops:
- archive.supplier_products_raw_history_legacy  ~5 080 MB
- archive.image_validation_log                  ~  24 MB
- backup.xbz_suppliers_cred_bkp_20260605 — 1 row of old_credentials;
  access already revoked, now eliminated to remove residual credential
  exposure risk
- backup._deprecated_silver_variants/products   ~  22 MB combined

Both schemas are then dropped. Validation DO block confirms neither
schema exists post-migration.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01CvLXD2vCvvhm7jbBmVN7H3

* sec(db): pin search_path on 44 functions — fix function_search_path_mutable (WARN)

All 44 functions flagged by Supabase linter lint=0011 had proconfig=NULL,
leaving their search_path mutable and vulnerable to schema-hijacking attacks.
ALTER FUNCTION ... SET search_path = 'public', 'extensions' pins resolution
without breaking unqualified table/function references already in use.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01CvLXD2vCvvhm7jbBmVN7H3

* sec(db): drop INSERT policies with WITH CHECK=true — fix rls_policy_always_true (WARN)

kcer_pipeline_insert and kcpad_pipeline_insert had WITH CHECK=true on the
public pseudo-role, allowing any caller to INSERT into kit pipeline tables
unchecked. Pipeline processes use service_role (bypasses RLS) so these
policies were dead weight creating a security hole. Admin inserts remain
covered by the existing ALL policies.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01CvLXD2vCvvhm7jbBmVN7H3

* sec(db): add explicit RLS policies to 42 tables — fix rls_enabled_no_policy (INFO)

42 tables had RLS enabled but no policies (all rows blocked for non-service_role).
Groups:
- magazine_public_view_events partitions: mirrored parent's 3 policies
- supplier_products_raw_history partitions: mirrored parent's 2 policies
- 26 internal/pipeline/backup tables in public: admin-only ALL
- 6 cf_recon schema tables: admin-only ALL (fully-qualified function)

Uses (SELECT auth.uid()) throughout for constant-per-statement evaluation.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01CvLXD2vCvvhm7jbBmVN7H3

* perf(db): fix WARN advisors — auth_rls_initplan, multiple_permissive_policies, unused_index

Migrations 000012–000014 applied directly to Supabase project doufsxqlfjyuvxuezpln.

000012 — auth_rls_initplan (remaining 10 policies across 8 tables)
  Wraps auth.uid(), auth.role(), current_setting() in (SELECT ...) subplan pattern
  so they are evaluated once per statement instead of once per row.
  Tables: kit_component_enrichment_raw, kit_component_padronizacao,
  magazine_public_reactions, magazine_reader_state, pipeline_health_log,
  smoke_test_runs, webhook_dispatcher_log, workspace_notifications.

000013 — multiple_permissive_policies (10 combos across 9 tables)
  Consolidates OR-ed PERMISSIVE policies into single policies with explicit OR
  in USING/WITH CHECK, eliminating duplicate per-row policy evaluation.
  Tables: catalog_analytics, magazine_public_view_events (+ 5 partitions),
  magazines, product_views, smoke_test_runs.

000014 — unused_index (~75 indexes, 0 scans since last stats reset)
  Drops non-unique, non-PK, non-FK-support, non-GIN indexes to reduce
  write amplification on INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE. Largest wins: stock snapshot
  branch/supplier indexes (29 MB + 7 MB each). GIN, idx_fk_* and security
  log indexes intentionally kept.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01CvLXD2vCvvhm7jbBmVN7H3

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

perf(db): fix WARN-level Supabase advisor findings — auth_rls_initplan, multiple_permissive_policies, unused_index (#1712)

* docs(audit): auditoria exaustiva dos 200 commits (GitHub + Supabase + Vercel)

Relatório read-only cruzando code scanning, secret scanning, dependabot e CI
do GitHub; advisors de segurança (2.141, 112 ERROR) e performance (527) do
Supabase com verificação RLS/grants ao vivo; deploys/runtime da Vercel; e
varredura dos 200 commits + invariantes do CLAUDE.md.

Achados principais:
- P0: partições magazine_public_view_events_2026_* com RLS off e anon com
  SELECT/INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE sobre session_id/token_hash (exposição de PII).
- P1: service_role key vazada no histórico (alerta secret-scanning aberto);
  380 funções SECURITY DEFINER executáveis por anon; 104 security_definer_view;
  11/30 gates de CI vermelhos no main sem bloquear deploy; achados CodeQL high
  em runtime; URLs do projeto proibido em SQL de migrations; webhook fail-open.
- P2/perf: exposição GraphQL em massa, RLS USING(true), índices duplicados,
  RLS re-avaliando auth.* por linha, tabelas de backup para DROP.

Nenhuma alteração em banco ou código de produção.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Claude-Session: https://claude.ai/code/session_01CvLXD2vCvvhm7jbBmVN7H3

* security: P0 magazine RLS + P1-5 CodeQL HIGH fixes

P0-1 — magazine_public_view_events partitions (_2026_07–10):
  - ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY em todas as 4 partições
  - REVOKE ALL FROM anon, authenticated (service_role bypassa RLS)
  - Trigger magazine_ensure_view_event_partitions atualizado para
    hardenar automaticamente partições futuras

P1-5 CodeQL HIGH:
  - sanitize.ts: iterative strip + remove residual <> (incomplete-multi-char-sanitization)
  - useMagazineReaderState.ts: Math.random → crypto.randomUUID/getRandomValues (insecure-randomness)
  - logger.ts: Object.create(null) + hasOwnProperty guard (remote-property-injection)
  - imageProxy.ts: URL hostname === check em vez de includes (url-substring-sanitization)
  - OptimizedImage.tsx: URL parsing para imagedelivery.net e unsplash.com (url-substring-sanitization)
  - sw.js: hostname.includes → hostname === / endsWith (missing-regexp-anchor)

https://claude.ai/code/session_01CvLXD2vCvvhm7jbBmVN7H3

* security/quality: P1-7 webhook fail-closed + P2 any-type gate fix

P1-7 webhook-inbound:
  - Remove dead corsHeaders = '*' (nunca usado; shared cors.ts já cobre)
  - HMAC fail-closed: se WEBHOOK_INBOUND_SIGNING_SECRET não estiver setado,
    retorna 503 para chamadas não-service-role (era fail-open)

P2 check-any-type-baseline.mjs:
  - Regex corrigido para :\s*any\b e \bas\s+any\b (evita falso-positivo
    com nomes de variável como anyErr)
  - grep -P para suporte a Perl word-boundary \b

P2 rpc-overrides.ts + rest-client.ts:
  - rpcFn: any → rpcFn: unknown (tipo mais seguro)
  - { queryKey, signal }: any → tipagem explícita
  - error: any → error: { status?: number } | null

https://claude.ai/code/session_01CvLXD2vCvvhm7jbBmVN7H3

* chore: P2 cleanups — remove root junk files + MockupPromptManager typed

Root junk removal (hacks operacionais — expõem IP/infra, não pertencem ao repo):
  - test_hardcoded_key.ts, whitelist_external_ip.ts, clear_external_blocks.ts,
    reset_external_attempts.ts, check_external_*.ts, _check.ps1,
    CHANGES_SUMMARY.md, FINAL_STATUS.md

MockupPromptManager.tsx:
  - Migra untypedFrom<Technique>('personalization_techniques') →
    supabase.from('personalization_techniques') tipado (tabela já está em types.ts:16224)
  - Remove import desnecessário de untypedFrom

https://claude.ai/code/session_01CvLXD2vCvvhm7jbBmVN7H3

* perf(rls): fix auth_rls_initplan — wrap auth.uid() em subquery constante

Substitui bare auth.uid() por (SELECT auth.uid()) em 15 políticas RLS
de 8 tabelas de alto tráfego (content_articles, crm_callback_events,
discount_approval_audit, magazine_public_view_events, magazines,
product_badge_definitions, product_views, quote_history).

Impacto: elimina InitPlan por-linha; planner trata como constante —
melhoria de 10–100× em tabelas com 10k+ linhas.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01CvLXD2vCvvhm7jbBmVN7H3

* perf/sec: dedup indexes, FK indexes, policy consolidation & hardening

(A) Drop 4 exact duplicate indexes on kit_component_enrichment_raw
    and kit_component_padronizacao (long auto-gen names duplicating
    short idx_kcer_*/idx_kcpad_* — same column, no WHERE difference).

(B) Create 2 missing FK indexes: magazine_templates.template_id and
    magazines.template_id — FK joins were doing seq scans.

(C) Drop redundant "Users can view own views" SELECT policy on
    product_views — superseded by two explicit policies (exec-7).
    Reduces per-row evaluation from 3 permissive policies to 2.

(D) Harden 3 USING(true)/WITH CHECK(true) ALL policies for
    authenticated role on color_synonym_map, product_qa_image_alerts,
    qa_image_coverage_log: split into SELECT-for-all + ALL-for-admin,
    preventing non-admin authenticated users from writing reference/QA data.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01CvLXD2vCvvhm7jbBmVN7H3

* sec: revoke anon/authenticated access to archive.* and backup.* schemas

Archive and backup schemas contained historical/deprecated tables
(audit_log, auth_login_attempts, staging data, supplier backups)
inadvertently accessible via the public role USAGE grant.

Revokes USAGE on both schemas + all current table privileges + default
privileges for future tables. Includes DO block that raises EXCEPTION
if any grants remain, making the migration self-validating.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01CvLXD2vCvvhm7jbBmVN7H3

* sec(rls): revoke EXECUTE on secdef functions from anon/authenticated — P1-2

(A) Dynamic loop strips ~200 pipeline/credential SECURITY DEFINER functions
    from anon, preserving whitelist: login flows, public catalog RPCs, and
    RLS helper functions (PG requires EXECUTE for roles used in USING clauses).

(B) Explicit revoke from authenticated for 34 credential-leaking and
    destructive-admin functions: fn_get_asia_api_key, fn_get_cf_api_token,
    get_vault_secret, get_edge_anon_key, fn_cascade_product_deactivation,
    fn_vacuum_high_dead_tuples, fn_pgrst_reload, and 27 others.

Both blocks use BEGIN/EXCEPTION to not abort on individual misses.
Idempotent: has_function_privilege() guard skips functions without the grant.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01CvLXD2vCvvhm7jbBmVN7H3

* sec(views): add security_invoker=on to ~65 internal/admin views — P1-3

All internal monitoring, pipeline, QA, and admin views now execute with
the calling user's privileges instead of the view owner's. This prevents
authenticated users from reading internal tables (kit pipeline, system
health, AI enrichment, stock QA, SPOT health) by going through the view.

Excluded from this migration (preserved as-is):
- Views with explicit security_invoker=false (public catalog flows that
  need the view owner's grants to serve anon users)
- Public product/supplier/image/video catalog views (v_products_public,
  v_suppliers_public, v_product_images_cdn, mv_product_cards, etc.)
- Sitemap views and novelty home views

Already had security_invoker=true: performance dashboard, slow queries,
price history, AI routing, orphan variants, image type dropblockers.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01CvLXD2vCvvhm7jbBmVN7H3

* sec(storage): harden mockup-assets bucket — remove anon enumeration — P2

(A) Drops "Anyone can view mockup assets" (public role SELECT) replacing it
    with authenticated-only SELECT. Public URLs (getPublicUrl) still work
    via CDN since bucket remains public=true; only API-level file listing
    by anon is blocked.

(B/C) Fixes auth.uid() InitPlan bug in UPDATE and DELETE policies —
    replaced with (SELECT auth.uid()) to evaluate once per query.

(D) Adds scoped INSERT policy for authenticated users limited to their
    own folder prefix (auth.uid() as first path segment). Edge functions
    using service_role bypass RLS and are unaffected.

Validation DO block confirms no anon SELECT policy remains.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01CvLXD2vCvvhm7jbBmVN7H3

* ci: fix non-existent action versions across 30 workflow files

Replace actions/checkout@v5, actions/setup-node@v6 and
actions/upload-artifact@v5 — versions that do not exist — with
their current stable counterparts (@v4). Affected workflows span
e2e, visual-tests, ci-freight-quality, ci-quotes-wizard, delivery,
deploy-*, edge-integration-all, contract-tests and others.

Third-party actions (crazy-max/ghaction-github-labeler@v5,
dawidd6/action-download-artifact@v6) are left unchanged as those
version numbers are correct for their respective projects.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01CvLXD2vCvvhm7jbBmVN7H3

* cleanup(db): drop archive and backup schemas — ~5.2 GB freed

Physically removes all 45 archive.* and 42 backup.* tables after
migration 000004 had already revoked anon/authenticated access.

Notable drops:
- archive.supplier_products_raw_history_legacy  ~5 080 MB
- archive.image_validation_log                  ~  24 MB
- backup.xbz_suppliers_cred_bkp_20260605 — 1 row of old_credentials;
  access already revoked, now eliminated to remove residual credential
  exposure risk
- backup._deprecated_silver_variants/products   ~  22 MB combined

Both schemas are then dropped. Validation DO block confirms neither
schema exists post-migration.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01CvLXD2vCvvhm7jbBmVN7H3

* sec(db): pin search_path on 44 functions — fix function_search_path_mutable (WARN)

All 44 functions flagged by Supabase linter lint=0011 had proconfig=NULL,
leaving their search_path mutable and vulnerable to schema-hijacking attacks.
ALTER FUNCTION ... SET search_path = 'public', 'extensions' pins resolution
without breaking unqualified table/function references already in use.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01CvLXD2vCvvhm7jbBmVN7H3

* sec(db): drop INSERT policies with WITH CHECK=true — fix rls_policy_always_true (WARN)

kcer_pipeline_insert and kcpad_pipeline_insert had WITH CHECK=true on the
public pseudo-role, allowing any caller to INSERT into kit pipeline tables
unchecked. Pipeline processes use service_role (bypasses RLS) so these
policies were dead weight creating a security hole. Admin inserts remain
covered by the existing ALL policies.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01CvLXD2vCvvhm7jbBmVN7H3

* sec(db): add explicit RLS policies to 42 tables — fix rls_enabled_no_policy (INFO)

42 tables had RLS enabled but no policies (all rows blocked for non-service_role).
Groups:
- magazine_public_view_events partitions: mirrored parent's 3 policies
- supplier_products_raw_history partitions: mirrored parent's 2 policies
- 26 internal/pipeline/backup tables in public: admin-only ALL
- 6 cf_recon schema tables: admin-only ALL (fully-qualified function)

Uses (SELECT auth.uid()) throughout for constant-per-statement evaluation.
